name: forge-app-design
description: Codex-native product design orchestration for Forge admin prototypes.

interface.shortDescription: Design and build Forge admin prototypes from PRDs.
interface.longDescription: Forge App Design is the ForgeUI downstream peer to Product Design for Codex-native admin prototyping. It consumes Product Design or Forge Design handoffs, turns Page Intent Specs and IA into runnable ForgeUI pages, and validates the result with screenshots, product-quality, visual, and build gates.
interface.defaultPrompt: Help me design a Forge admin prototype from this PRD.
